creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
has this been reported upstream yet?

which desktop environment / WM is this?

i have tested this release in LXDE (OpenBox), enlightenment (?) and Plasma

it takes considerable time to start in enlightenment, that much i noticed (and it doesn't have a presence in the system tray, because, well, enlightenment doesn't seem to have a system tray
